stemHtml: The CG of an aeroplane is in a fixed position forward of the neutral point. Which of these statements about the stick force stability is correct?

options.a: Stick force stability is not affected by trim.
options.b: Maintaining a steady speed below the trim speed requires a push force.
options.c: Aeroplane nose down trim increases the stick force stability.
options.d: An increase of 10 kt from the trimmed position at high speed has less effect on the stick force than an increase of 10 kt from the trimmed position at low speed.
